title: Vanilla Plus Shader
description: A shaderpack that gives Minecraft a modern visual overhaul while staying faithful to its original look.
body:
![Vanilla Plus Banner](https://rre36.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/VPlus-Banner.jpg)

## **What is the Vanilla Plus Shader?**
This shaderpack gives the the game a modern and streamlined visual overhaul while staying faithful to the original visuals.

## **What features does it offer?**
* Dynamic soft shadows
* Volumetric vanilla-style clouds (they rely on the cloud texture from the resourcepack as well)
* Temporal Anti-Aliasing
* Improved lighting and dynamic colours
* Optional custom water and screenspace reflections
* Screenspace godrays
* Support for resourcepack materials based on the labPBR standard
* Various colour profiles that imitate certain looks or older shaderpacks that are broken on modern Minecraft versions (examples below)
* Various optional lens effects such as depth of field, lens flares and vignette

![Examples of colour profiles](https://i.postimg.cc/j2vdjKhp/profiles2020-12.jpg)

## **Any Requirements?**
* OptiFine for 1.16 or newer/Iris 1.5.0 or newer
* A graphics card that supports OpenGL 4.3 or newer
* Windows/Linux

## **External Links:**
* My Website: [Link](https://rre36.com/vanilla-plus)
* My Discord Server: [Link](https://discord.gg/y5xzQ6H)
